q1.question: What is included in my ticket?
q1.answer: Your ticket includes full access to Accelerate Hong Kong, featuring boundary-pushing talks, workshops, and meaningful connections across the Solana ecosystem and beyond.

q2.question: Does my Consensus ticket also give me access to Accelerate?
q2.answer: No - Accelerate requires a separate ticket from Consensus.

q3.question: Is there a dress code?
q3.answer: There's no dress code. Come as you are and wear whatever you're comfortable in.

q4.question: Where should I stay?
q4.answer: Visit the Getting There section for more information.

gettingThere.heading: Getting there
gettingThere.accommodationsSubValue: Consensus is offering discounted hotel rates.
gettingThere.nomadzSubValue: web3-native travel aggregator on Solana. Save up to 60% on hotels and pay in crypto.

eventDetails.heading: Event details
eventDetails.venueAddress: 1901 Convention Center Dr, Miami Beach, FL 33139

q1.question: What is included in my ticket?
q1.answer: Your ticket includes full access to Accelerate Miami, featuring boundary-pushing talks, workshops, and meaningful connections across the Solana ecosystem and beyond.

q2.question: What are the different ticket tiers?
q2.answer: We offer General Admission ($99) and Student tickets ($25). Both provide full conference access including all talks, workshops, and networking opportunities.

q3.question: Are there student discounts available?
q3.answer: Yes! Students can apply for a discounted ticket at $25. You'll need to verify your student status during the application process.

q4.question: Can I get a refund on my ticket?
q4.answer: Refund requests must be made at least 14 days before the event. Please contact events@solana.org for refund inquiries.

q5.question: Is there a dress code?
q5.answer: There's no dress code. Come as you are and wear whatever you're comfortable in.

q6.question: Where should I stay?
q6.answer: Visit the Getting There section for hotel recommendations near the Miami Beach Convention Center.

q7.question: What time should I arrive?
q7.answer: Doors open at 8:00 AM ET for registration. The first session begins at 9:00 AM ET. We recommend arriving early to check in and get settled.

q8.question: Will there be food and drinks?
q8.answer: Yes, light refreshments and lunch will be provided for all attendees throughout the day.

q9.question: Can I speak at Accelerate Miami?
q9.answer: Speaker applications are currently closed. Follow @solana on X for announcements about future speaking opportunities.

q10.question: How can I become a sponsor?
q10.answer: For sponsorship inquiries, please contact events@solana.org. We offer a range of sponsorship packages to fit different needs.

q11.question: Will sessions be recorded?
q11.answer: Yes, most sessions will be recorded and made available after the event. Follow @solana on X for updates on when recordings will be published.

gettingThere.heading: Getting there
gettingThere.accommodationsValue: Hotels near Miami Beach Convention Center
gettingThere.accommodationsSubValue: Multiple hotel options available within walking distance.
